style._text: #logo-container{margin-bottom:40px}#logo-container img,#logo-container svg{height:40px;width:auto}@media screen and (max-width:800px){#logo-container{margin-bottom:30px}#logo-container img,#logo-container svg{height:30px}}.error-body{box-sizing:content-box;margin:70px auto;max-width:500px;padding:10px 20px}.error-body h1{background:none;color:#333;font:700 47px/1.5 sans-serif;margin:.6em 0}@media screen and (max-width:800px){.error-body h1{font-size:35px}}.error-body p{background:none;color:#333;font:21px/1.5 Georgia,serif;margin:1.5em 0}@media screen and (max-width:800px){.error-body p{font-size:18px}}.error-body small{color:gray;font-size:70%;text-transform:uppercase}.error-body:after{background:url("data:image/gif;base64,");background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:20vw;bottom:0;content:"";filter:grayscale(100%);height:20vw;image-rendering:pixelated;opacity:.2;position:fixed;right:1vw;width:20vw;z-index:-1}#cloudflare-message,#custom-message{color:#424242}#cloudflare-message h1,#cloudflare-message p{display:none;visibility:hidden}#cloudflare-message ul{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0}#cloudflare-message #challenge-body-text,#cloudflare-message h1,#cloudflare-message h2{display:none;visibility:hidden}

p._text: We need to review the security of your connection before proceeding.

_text: const translations=JSON.parse('{"DEFAULT":{"documentTitle":"Checking security","heading":"Checking if the connection is secure","content":"We need to review the security of your connection before proceeding."},"cs":{"documentTitle":"Kontrola zabezpečení","heading":"Kontrola, zda je připojení bezpečné","content":"Než budeme pokračovat, musíme zkontrolovat zabezpečení vašeho připojení."},"sk":{"documentTitle":"Kontrola zabezpečenia","heading":"Kontrola, či je pripojenie bezpečné","content":"Skôr ako budeme pokračovať, musíme skontrolovať zabezpečenie vášho pripojenia."},"bg":{"documentTitle":"Проверка на сигурността","heading":"Проверка за сигурността на връзката","content":"Необходимо е да проверим сигурността на връзката Ви, преди да продължите."},"hu":{"documentTitle":"Biztonsági ellenőrzés","heading":"Annak ellenőrzése, hogy a kapcsolat biztonságos-e","content":"Mielőtt folytatnánk, ellenőriznünk kell a kapcsolata biztonságát."},"ro":{"documentTitle":"Verificare de securitate","heading":"Verificam daca conexiunea este sigura","content":"Inainte de a continua, trebuie sa verificam securitatea conexiunii."},"sl":{"documentTitle":"Preverjanje varnosti","heading":"Preverjamo varnost vaše povezave","content":"Pred nadaljevanjem moramo preveriti varnost vaše povezave."},"hr":{"documentTitle":"Provjera sigurnosti","heading":"Provjera sigurnosti veze","content":"Prije nego što nastavite, moramo provjeriti sigurnost vaše veze."},"sr":{"documentTitle":"Provera sigurnosti","heading":"Provera da li je konekcija sigurna","content":"Moramo da ocenimo sigurnost vaše konekcije pre nego što nastavite."},"bs":{"documentTitle":"Provera sigurnosti","heading":"Provera da li je konekcija sigurna","content":"Moramo da ocenimo sigurnost vaše konekcije pre nego što nastavite."}}'),logos=JSON.parse("{\"HEUREKA_GROUP\":\"
